description: Documented, intentional backward-incompatible changes to the public C API
Each entry suppresses one otherwise-failing finding. 'kind' is 'removed'
(a function that existed in the baseline is gone) or 'changed' (its
signature changed). Only add entries for changes that are deliberate and
reviewed; every entry needs a reason.

allow.reason: Declared in c.h but never implemented anywhere in RocksDB (WriteBatchWithIndex has no constructor from a serialized representation). The symbol never existed, so no consumer could have linked against it; the dead declaration was removed.
